name: contam-plugin
description: Public Codex plugin and MCP toolkit for CONTAM project inspection, simulation, and ContamW-safe workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run and inspect CONTAM projects through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Packages a local CONTAM MCP server, Codex workflow skill, project guard script, CONTAM Chinese localization linkage, installation/API discovery, project inspection, diagnostics, case hygiene, scenario cloning, case matrices, ContamW SketchPad layout generation, GUI-safe result settings, contamxpy co-simulation, simulation, text-result triage, and bridge sessions.
defaultPrompt: Make this PRJ safe for ContamW Building Check and result review.
